detailed_description: Our Bathroom Deep Cleaning service for one bathroom includes thorough scrubbing of tiles, descaling of fittings, deep cleaning of toilet, basin, shower area, and removal of tough stains and soap scum. Ideal for homeowners or tenants looking to restore hygiene and freshness in a single bathroom. The service ensures a sparkling, germ-free space with long-lasting cleanliness.

This service provides comprehensive deep cleaning for two bathrooms, including tiles, sanitary ware, mirrors, fittings, and hard water stain removal. Perfect for families or shared homes that require detailed attention in multiple bathrooms. Enjoy a sanitized, odor-free environment with visibly renewed surfaces.

Designed for larger homes, this package covers deep cleaning of three bathrooms with descaling, scrubbing, and disinfecting of all surfaces and fixtures. Suitable for households seeking professional-grade hygiene across multiple bathrooms. The result is a spotless, hygienic, and refreshed bathroom space.

Our 1 BHK Open Premises Deep Cleaning targets vacant homes, covering floors, kitchen, bathrooms, windows, and all surfaces. Ideal for newly constructed or recently vacated properties before moving in. This service ensures a dust-free, sanitized, and move-in-ready home.

Tailored for lived-in 1 BHK homes, this deep cleaning service includes careful cleaning around furniture, appliances, and high-touch areas. Perfect for families wanting a seasonal or festive refresh without disrupting daily life. Experience a healthier, revitalized living space.

This service thoroughly cleans a vacant 2 BHK property, including bedrooms, living areas, kitchen, bathrooms, and floors. Ideal for property handovers, rentals, or pre-move-in preparation. It delivers a spotless, hygienic environment ready for immediate occupancy.

Our 2 BHK Occupied Deep Cleaning focuses on detailed cleaning of all rooms while carefully working around your belongings. Suitable for families seeking a comprehensive home refresh. The service enhances indoor hygiene, comfort, and overall appearance.

Designed for vacant 3 BHK homes, this service includes deep cleaning of bedrooms, living areas, kitchen, bathrooms, and floors. Ideal for new homeowners or landlords preparing a property for tenants. It ensures a pristine, sanitized, and welcoming space.

This package delivers meticulous cleaning for occupied 3 BHK homes, addressing hidden dirt, high-touch areas, and hard-to-reach spots. Best suited for larger families wanting a thorough home makeover. Enjoy improved cleanliness, hygiene, and a refreshed ambiance.

Our 4 BHK Open Premises Deep Cleaning provides an extensive clean-up of large vacant homes, covering every room and surface. Ideal for luxury property owners or real estate turnovers. The service ensures a dust-free, polished, and ready-to-move-in property.

This comprehensive cleaning service is tailored for occupied 4 BHK homes, with careful attention to furniture, fixtures, and high-traffic areas. Suitable for large households seeking professional-level sanitation. The result is a healthier, cleaner, and more comfortable living space.

We provide detailed deep cleaning for empty duplex homes above 2000 sq ft, including staircases, rooms, kitchens, and bathrooms. Ideal for post-construction or pre-move-in preparation. This service ensures a thoroughly cleaned, dust-free, and hygienic environment.

Focused on living areas in duplex homes, this service covers deep cleaning of floors, furniture surfaces, windows, and décor areas. Perfect for homeowners wanting to enhance their primary gathering spaces. It restores shine and creates a welcoming atmosphere.

Specially designed for spacious villas, this service deeply cleans living rooms ranging from 3000 to 5000 sq ft. Suitable for luxury homeowners seeking premium care for expansive areas. Enjoy immaculate floors, polished surfaces, and refreshed interiors.

Our Villa Occupied Deep Cleaning covers large, lived-in villas between 5000 and 8000 sq ft with meticulous attention to every corner. Ideal for high-end residences requiring detailed sanitation and surface care. The service delivers a superior level of cleanliness and comfort.

This service provides deep cleaning for vacant commercial spaces above 5000 sq ft, including floors, restrooms, and work areas. Ideal for offices, retail outlets, or showrooms before occupancy. It ensures a professional, hygienic environment ready for operations.

We offer thorough cleaning for operational commercial spaces over 5000 sq ft with minimal disruption to business activities. Perfect for offices and institutions seeking regular or periodic deep cleaning. The service promotes a clean, safe, and productive workspace.

Designed for smaller offices and retail spaces, this service covers deep cleaning of areas between 2000 and 3000 sq ft. Ideal for maintaining hygiene and professional appearance. It enhances workplace cleanliness and client impressions.

Our Bathroom Wet Wiping service focuses on wiping and disinfecting bathroom surfaces, mirrors, and fixtures. Ideal for routine maintenance between deep cleans. It keeps your bathroom fresh, hygienic, and visibly clean.

service_name: Geyser, Exhaust, Window Sills & Glass Partition Cleaning
detailed_description: This service includes cleaning of geysers, exhaust fans, window sills, and glass partitions to remove dust, grime, and stains. Perfect for homeowners wanting detailed attention to often-overlooked areas. It enhances cleanliness and improves overall bathroom appearance.

This service uses professional-grade scrub machines to remove stubborn stains, hard water marks, and deep-seated grime from bathroom floors and tiles. Ideal for bathrooms with heavy buildup that regular cleaning cannot address. It restores surface shine and significantly improves overall hygiene.

service_name: Tiles, Basin, Toilets & Water Closet Cleaning
detailed_description: We thoroughly clean and disinfect tiles, wash basins, toilets, and water closets to eliminate stains, germs, and odors. Suitable for routine or intensive bathroom sanitation needs. The service ensures a sparkling, hygienic, and fresh-smelling bathroom.

Our Balcony Deep Cleaning service removes dust, bird droppings, stains, and debris from floors, railings, and walls. Ideal for apartments and homes with neglected or weather-exposed balconies. It transforms your balcony into a clean and enjoyable outdoor space.

service_name: Floor Cleaning Using Single Disc Machine
detailed_description: This service utilizes a single disc machine to deep clean and polish various types of flooring, removing embedded dirt and dullness. Perfect for residential and commercial spaces needing floor restoration. It enhances shine, cleanliness, and floor longevity.
